ddls:
CREATE TABLE "testing_data" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test record */,
  "table_type" TEXT /* Type of testing data (e.g., Current, Previous Week) */,
  "window_title" TEXT /* Title of the testing window (e.g., Community Resident Testing) */,
  "table_title" TEXT /* Title of the testing table (e.g., Current Week) */,
  "group_1" TEXT /* Group or neighborhood being tested (e.g., BOSTON, Allston/Brighton) */,
  "persons_tested" INTEGER /* Number of persons tested */,
  "test_rate" REAL /* Rate of testing per 100,000 persons */,
  "positive_tests" INTEGER /* Number of positive tests */,
  "positive_rate" REAL /* Rate of positive tests per 100,000 persons */,
  "positivity" REAL /* Positivity rate as a percentage */,
  "date_of_test" TEXT /* Date when the test was conducted */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the tested individuals */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the tested individuals */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race of the tested individuals */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the tested individuals */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of test conducted */,
  "test_result_received_date" TEXT /* Date when the test result was received */,
  "symptoms" TEXT /* Whether the tested individual had symptoms */,
  "test_location" TEXT /* Location where the test was conducted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_testing_data_window_title FOREIGN KEY ("window_title") REFERENCES testing_windows ("window_title"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_testing_data_group_1 FOREIGN KEY ("group_1") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_testing_data_table_title FOREIGN KEY ("table_title") REFERENCES testing_tables ("table_title")
)

CREATE TABLE "neighborhoods" (
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighborhood */,
  "neighborhood_name" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the neighborhood */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the neighborhood */,
  "geographic_area" TEXT /* Geographic area of the neighborhood */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of the neighborhood */,
  "density" REAL /* Population density of the neighborhood */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "testing_windows" (
  "window_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each testing window */,
  "window_title" TEXT /* Title of the testing window */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the testing window */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the testing window */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the testing window */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the testing window */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("window_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "testing_tables" (
  "table_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each testing table */,
  "table_title" TEXT /* Title of the testing table */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the testing table */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the testing table */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the testing table */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the testing data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("table_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., public health official, city administrator) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each test record
Type of testing data (e.g., Current, Previous Week)
Title of the testing window (e.g., Community Resident Testing)
Title of the testing table (e.g., Current Week)
Group or neighborhood being tested (e.g., BOSTON, Allston/Brighton)
Rate of positive tests per 100,000 persons
Date when the test was conducted
Age group of the tested individuals
Date when the test result was received
Whether the tested individual had symptoms
Location where the test was conducted

Start date of the testing window
End date of the testing window
Unique identifier for each testing table
Start date of the testing table
End date of the testing table
Role of the user (e.g., public health official, city administrator)
Date of the user's last login
